CustomField.formula: IF( Hours__c > 0 , Hours__c , IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Date_In__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Time_In__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Date_Out__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Time_Out__c)) ), ( (DATETIMEVALUE(Date_Out__c) + (VALUE(MID(TEXT(Time_Out__c), 1, 2)) + VALUE(MID(TEXT(Time_Out__c), 4, 2)) / 60) / 24) - (DATETIMEVALUE(Date_In__c) + (VALUE(MID(TEXT(Time_In__c), 1, 2)) + VALUE(MID(TEXT(Time_In__c), 4, 2)) / 60) / 24) ) * 24, 0 ))
CustomField.label: Total Hours
